student_verification.declaration: I have reviewed all LLM-generated content and verified its correctness against the paper. All design decisions, ablation choices, and failure mode analysis are my own.

interactions.prompt: How can I implement the CS4VM label mean estimation step using sklearn SVC?
interactions.purpose: Translate the iterative procedure from Eq 7-8 into sklearn code
interactions.llm_response_used: Core algorithm structure used as scaffold - extensively modified for correctness
interactions.student_modification: Added balanced split, fixed one-class edge case, added proper cost weights for virtual mean points matching paper's Eq 6

interactions.prompt: How to add sample weights to sklearn SVC?
interactions.purpose: Implement the weighted virtual mean points for Eq 6
interactions.llm_response_used: Learned about sample_weight parameter in fit()

interactions.prompt: Explain the relationship between Eq 6 and Eq 9 in the CS4VM paper - how does the dual form arise?
interactions.purpose: Understand what the code needs to implement for Eq 9
interactions.llm_response_used: Background only - used to verify the virtual mean point approach
